title: SKILL-DISCO: Distilling and Compiling Agent Traces into Reusable Procedural Skills
abstract: arXiv:2606.26669v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Agents often repeatedly solve similar task instances from scratch, leading to unnecessary reasoning cost and long execution traces. Prior work has explored workflow reuse and executable skill induction, but it remains unclear which task scenarios admit procedural skills and how the shared procedural structure should be represented across successful traces. We study this problem in FSM-defined scenarios, where successful traces can be viewed as paths in an unknown transition graph, and formulate procedural skills as reusable parameterized control-flow subgraphs. Based on this view, we introduce SkillDisCo, a distillation-and-compilation framework that distills reusable PFSM subgraphs from successful traces and compiles them into callable, executable, and verifiable procedural skills. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebArena show that SkillDisCo improves success rates and reduces agent turns across benchmarks and model scales, demonstrating th

Title: SKILL-DISCO: Distilling and Compiling Agent Traces into Reusable Procedural Skills
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26669v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Agents often repeatedly solve similar task instances from scratch, leading to unnecessary reasoning cost and long execution traces. Prior work has explored workflow reuse and executable skill induction, but it remains unclear which task scenarios admit procedural skills and how the shared procedural structure should be represented across successful traces. translated_title: SKILL-DISCO：将智能体轨迹提炼并编译为可复用的程序化技能
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26669v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：智能体通常从零开始重复解决类似的任务实例，导致不必要的推理成本并产生较长的执行轨迹。先前的工作已经探索了工作流复用和可执行技能归纳，但仍不清楚哪些任务场景适合程序化技能，以及如何在成功轨迹之间表示共享的程序化结构。我们在有限状态机定义的任务场景中研究这一问题，其中成功轨迹可被视为未知转移图中的路径，并将程序化技能形式化为可复用的参数化控制流子图。基于这一观点，我们提出了SkillDisCo，一个蒸馏与编译框架，它从成功轨迹中蒸馏出可复用的PFSM子图，并将其编译为可调用、可执行且可验证的程序化技能。在ALFWorld和WebArena上的实验表明，SkillDisCo在不同基准测试和模型规模下均能提高任务成功率并减少智能体交互轮次，证明了其有效性。
tldr: 提出了SkillDisCo框架，通过将智能体成功轨迹蒸馏为可复用的程序化技能并编译执行，显著提升了任务成功率和执行效率。
en_tdlr: The SkillDisCo framework improves task success rates and execution efficiency by distilling reusable procedural skills from agent success traces and compiling them into executable form.
